Community: CSCU Data Operations; CSCU Glossary Stewards
Notes: The single Data Steward: connects sources, profiles, runs identification; stewards Member, Accounts & Deposits, Transactions and Branch Operations terms
Stewards Lending and Finance & Ledger terms incl. Loan Number
BSA/AML officer; stewards Compliance & Risk (all CDE) and Records & Documents terms
Stewards Cards & Payments terms incl. Card Number and Routing Number
Storage & custodian persona: creates/ingests data sources (the bulk loader needs this role), monitors storage utilization; the app's Govern custodian slot maps from this role
Data Developer persona: authors the Workshop 4 business rules and metadata/domain rules (in PDC v11 this role owns Business Rules; note the Admin role cannot create them)
Data User persona: reads metadata, searches, views dashboards and data assets for their line of business — cannot edit the glossary or connect sources
Business User persona (lightest tier): views the business glossary and policies only — no data-source access; the contrast case to Jordan (Data User)
Creates users, defines custom properties, manages workers and licence (in the lab, catalog.admin carries all seven roles)
